ksa_text: Knowledge of DataOps principles and practices, including pipeline automation, environment management, data testing strategies, configuration-as-code, and the distinction between DataOps, DevOps, and MLOps as complementary disciplines.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-021 (AI, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.3961 is insufficient to establish relevance to business intelligence development and analytics engineering at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.396, dcwf=0.395, nice=0.381) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3961 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-K-021 (composite 0.3961) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3961 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for BI Developer at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.3961 is not a standard requirement for BI Developer at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3961, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
